category_sources: Official GitHub README describes pyp as a shell-oriented tool for applying Python to input.
source_facts.description says pyp runs Python at the shell.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses pyp.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, how-it-works, and examples sections and is the best documentation surface found.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README is for hauntsaninja/pyp.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README examples position pyp as a replacement for common shell utilities.
source_facts.description identifies a shell Python tool.
